mapper.select: SELECT a.*,s.USERNAME as user_name FROM `publish_notice_info` a LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON a.CREATED_BY = s.USER_ID WHERE a.is_top = "1" and a.time < #{timeMillis} and a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.LAST_UPDATED_DATE desc LIMIT 1
SELECT a.*,s.USERNAME as user_name FROM `publish_notice_info` a LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON a.CREATED_BY = s.USER_ID WHERE a.id != #{id} and a.time < #{timeMillis} and a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.time desc

SELECT a.*,s.USERNAME as user_name FROM `publish_notice_info` a LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON a.CREATED_BY = s.USER_ID WHERE a.time < #{timeMillis} and a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.LAST_UPDATED_DATE desc LIMIT 1
